hero.title: Making a Difference in People's Lives
hero.description: Registered NGO No. 1784 of 2007, working to empower the community through medical, food, and social support.

activities.title: Our Activities & Impact
activities.kitchenDesc: 25,000 meals cooked throughout Ramadan and distributed directly to the needy. (8 years of continuous goodness)
activities.pharmacyDesc: Dispensing free treatments year-round. Medicine is a right for every needy person (50,000 EGP monthly).
activities.medicalDesc: 10 years of excellence. Comprehensive free healthcare including incubators, surgery, and 13+ clinics.
activities.aidDesc: Supporting over 25 families (20,000 EGP monthly), providing medical equipment, and urgent living support.
